questions.question: When does a Pinia plugin function run?
options: Once per component that uses the store
Once when the Pinia instance is created

questions.question: What does $subscribe provide inside a Pinia plugin?
options: A way to subscribe to Pinia devtools events
A callback that fires on every store state change
An observable stream of action calls
A hook that fires when the store is destroyed

questions.question: How do you add TypeScript types for custom properties added to all stores via a plugin?
options: Export an interface from the plugin file and import it in each store
Use declare module 'pinia' { export interface PiniaCustomProperties {...} }
Pass a TypeScript generic to defineStore: defineStore<CustomProps>(...)
Add the property to the global Window interface
